'''Brawl and Grill''' was an establishment located in [[Trader's Quarter]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. [[Callandri]] found [[Alton Lochner]] in Brawl and Grill and attempted to [[Death/Legends|kill]] him. However, Lochner was saved by his friends [[Adazian Liebke]] and [[Tirranna]].<ref name="AIR" />
